content.text: Toolchain ready. Now extract the source to /app/sqlite and configure with gcov instrumentation.

input.command: cd /app && tar xzf vendor/sqlite-fossil-release.tar.gz && ls -d sqlite && ls sqlite | head; echo "---configure help gcov---"; grep -i "gcov\|coverage" /app/sqlite/configure /app/sqlite/Makefile.in 2>/dev/null | head

content.text:
sqlite
LICENSE.md
Makefile.in
Makefile.linux-generic
Makefile.msc
README.md
VERSION
art
auto.def
autoconf
autosetup
---configure help gcov---
/app/sqlite/Makefile.in:# If gcov support was enabled by the configure script, add the appropriate
/app/sqlite/Makefile.in:# causes build errors with -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage with some GCCs.
/app/sqlite/Makefile.in:# Supposedly GCC does the right thing if you use --coverage, but in
/app/sqlite/Makefile.in:CFLAGS.gcov1 = -DSQLITE_COVERAGE_TEST=1 -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage
/app/sqlite/Makefile.in:LDFLAGS.gcov1 = -lgcov
/app/sqlite/Makefile.in:USE_GCOV = @USE_GCOV@
/app/sqlite/Makefile.in:T.compile.gcov = $(CFLAGS.gcov$(USE_GCOV))
/app/sqlite/Makefile.in:T.link.gcov = $(LDFLAGS.gcov$(USE_GCOV))

content.text: The build system supports gcov. Let me check the configure option name.

input.command: cd /app/sqlite && grep -i "gcov" auto.def autosetup/* 2>/dev/null | head; echo "---help---"; ./configure --help 2>&1 | grep -i "gcov\|coverage"

content.text:
auto.def:  proj-define-for-opt gcov USE_GCOV "Use gcov?"
autosetup/sqlite-config.tcl:        gcov=0
autosetup/sqlite-config.tcl:          => {Enable coverage testing using gcov}
autosetup/sqlite-config.tcl:      TARGET_* USE_GCOV TCL_*} \
autosetup/sqlite-config.tcl:    gcov
autosetup/sqlite-config.tcl:        -none {HAVE_CFLAG_* LDFLAGS_* SH_* SQLITE_AUTORECONFIG TARGET_* USE_GCOV TCL_*}
---help---
  --gcov                           Enable coverage testing using gcov

content.text:
USE_GCOV = 1
T.compile.gcov = $(CFLAGS.gcov$(USE_GCOV))
T.link.gcov = $(LDFLAGS.gcov$(USE_GCOV))
---building---
./jimsh /app/sqlite/tool/mkopcodec.tcl opcodes.h >opcodes.c
cc -g -o mksourceid /app/sqlite/tool/mksourceid.c
./jimsh /app/sqlite/tool/mksqlite3h.tcl /app/sqlite -o sqlite3.h
cp /app/sqlite/ext/fts5/fts5parse.y .
rm -f fts5parse.h
./lemon  -S fts5parse.y
./jimsh /app/sqlite/ext/fts5/tool/mkfts5c.tcl
cp /app/sqlite/ext/fts5/fts5.h .
rm -rf tsrc
mkdir tsrc
cp -f /app/sqlite/src/alter.c /app/sqlite/src/analyze.c /app/sqlite/src/attach.c /app/sqlite/src/auth.c /app/sqlite/src/backup.c /app/sqlite/src/bitvec.c /app/sqlite/src/btmutex.c /app/sqlite/ext/icu/sqliteicu.h /app/sqlite/ext/icu/icu.c /app/sqlite/ext/rtree/rtree.h /app/sqlite/ext/rtree/rtree.c /app/sqlite/ext/rtree/geopoly.c /app/sqlite/ext/session/sqlite3session.c /app/sqlite/ext/session/sqlite3session.h /app/sqlite/ext/rbu/sqlite3rbu.h /app/sqlite/ext/rbu/sqlite3rbu.c /app/sqlite/ext/misc/stmt.c keywordhash.h opcodes.c opcodes.h parse.c parse.h sqlite_cfg.h shell.c sqlite3.h tsrc
rm -f tsrc/sqlite.h.in tsrc/parse.y
./jimsh /app/sqlite/tool/vdbe-compress.tcl  <tsrc/vdbe.c >vdbe.new
mv -f vdbe.new tsrc/vdbe.c
cp fts5.c fts5.h tsrc
touch .target_source
cc -g -o src-verify /app/sqlite/tool/src-verify.c
./jimsh /app/sqlite/tool/mksqlite3c.tcl --linemacros=0 
cp tsrc/sqlite3ext.h .
cp /app/sqlite/ext/session/sqlite3session.h .
cc -fPIC -O2 -g  -DSQLITE_ENABLE_MATH_FUNCTIONS -DSQLITE_THREADSAFE=1   -DSQLITE_COVERAGE_TEST=1 -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -D_HAVE_SQLITE_CONFIG_H -DBUILD_sqlite -DNDEBUG -I. -I/app/sqlite/src -I/app/sqlite/ext/rtree -I/app/sqlite/ext/icu -I/app/sqlite/ext/fts3 -I/app/sqlite/ext/session -I/app/sqlite/ext/misc -lgcov -o sqlite3 \
	shell.c sqlite3.c \
	 \
	 -DSQLITE_HAVE_ZLIB=1 -DSQLITE_DQS=0 -DSQLITE_ENABLE_FTS4 -DSQLITE_ENABLE_RTREE -DSQLITE_ENABLE_EXPLAIN_COMMENTS -DSQLITE_ENABLE_UNKNOWN_SQL_FUNCTION -DSQLITE_ENABLE_STMTVTAB -DSQLITE_ENABLE_DBPAGE_VTAB -DSQLITE_ENABLE_DBSTAT_VTAB -DSQLITE_ENABLE_BYTECODE_VTAB -DSQLITE_ENABLE_OFFSET_SQL_FUNC -DSQLITE_STRICT_SUBTYPE=1  \
	-Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib  -lm  -lz

rm -f tsrc/sqlite.h.in tsrc/parse.y
./jimsh /app/sqlite/tool/vdbe-compress.tcl  <tsrc/vdbe.c >vdbe.new
mv -f vdbe.new tsrc/vdbe.c
cp fts5.c fts5.h tsrc
touch .target_source
cc -g -o src-verify /app/sqlite/tool/src-verify.c
./jimsh /app/sqlite/tool/mksqlite3c.tcl --linemacros=0 
cp tsrc/sqlite3ext.h .
cp /app/sqlite/ext/session/sqlite3session.h .
cc -fPIC -O2 -g  -DSQLITE_ENABLE_MATH_FUNCTIONS -DSQLITE_THREADSAFE=1   -DSQLITE_COVERAGE_TEST=1 -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -D_HAVE_SQLITE_CONFIG_H -DBUILD_sqlite -DNDEBUG -I. -I/app/sqlite/src -I/app/sqlite/ext/rtree -I/app/sqlite/ext/icu -I/app/sqlite/ext/fts3 -I/app/sqlite/ext/session -I/app/sqlite/ext/misc -lgcov -o sqlite3 \
	shell.c sqlite3.c \
	 \
	 -DSQLITE_HAVE_ZLIB=1 -DSQLITE_DQS=0 -DSQLITE_ENABLE_FTS4 -DSQLITE_ENABLE_RTREE -DSQLITE_ENABLE_EXPLAIN_COMMENTS -DSQLITE_ENABLE_UNKNOWN_SQL_FUNCTION -DSQLITE_ENABLE_STMTVTAB -DSQLITE_ENABLE_DBPAGE_VTAB -DSQLITE_ENABLE_DBSTAT_VTAB -DSQLITE_ENABLE_BYTECODE_VTAB -DSQLITE_ENABLE_OFFSET_SQL_FUNC -DSQLITE_STRICT_SUBTYPE=1  \
	-Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib  -lm  -lz

content.text: The `sqlite3` shell built with `-fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage`. Let me verify the binary is instrumented and works, then put it on PATH.

input.command: cd /app/sqlite && ls -la sqlite3 shell.gcno 2>&1; echo "---gcov symbols---"; nm sqlite3 2>/dev/null | grep -i "gcov\|_llvm_gcov\|gcov_init" | head; echo "---.gcno files---"; ls *.gcno 2>&1; echo "---run---"; ./sqlite3 :memory: "select sqlite_version(); create table t(a); insert into t values(1),(2); select sum(a) from t;"

content.text: Coverage data (`.gcda`) generates and `gcov` reports line execution. Now install on PATH.

input.command: ln -sf /app/sqlite/sqlite3 /usr/local/bin/sqlite3 && rm -f /app/sqlite/*.gcda && hash -r && command -v sqlite3 && sqlite3 --version

content.text:
/usr/local/bin/sqlite3
3.50.4 2025-07-30 19:33:53 4d8adfb30e03f9cf27f800a2c1ba3c48fb4ca1b08b0f5ed59a4d5ecbf45e20a3 (64-bit)

Done. SQLite 3.50.4 is compiled with gcov instrumentation and available on PATH.

**What was done:**
- Installed the missing toolchain (`gcc`, `make`, `tcl`/`tcl-dev`, `zlib1g-dev`) — none was present.
- Extracted the pre-vendored snapshot to `/app/sqlite` (no network fetch).
- Configured with `./configure --gcov` (sets `USE_GCOV=1`), then built with `make sqlite3`. The compile used `-DSQLITE_COVERAGE_TEST=1 -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage` and linked `-lgcov`.
- Symlinked `/app/sqlite/sqlite3 → /usr/local/bin/sqlite3` so it's on PATH.

**Verification:**
- Binary contains `__gcov0.*` symbols and produced `.gcno` graph files at build.
- Running a query emits `.gcda` counters, and `gcov sqlite3-sqlite3.gcno` reports line-execution percentages — confirming end-to-end coverage instrumentation.
- `sqlite3 --version` → `3.50.4`; sample SQL runs correctly.

Note: coverage `.gcno` files and the object counters live in `/app/sqlite`; run the shell (or gcov) from there to collect/report coverage. I cleaned up the transient `.gcda` files from verification.

result:
Done. SQLite 3.50.4 is compiled with gcov instrumentation and available on PATH.

**What was done:**
- Installed the missing toolchain (`gcc`, `make`, `tcl`/`tcl-dev`, `zlib1g-dev`) — none was present.
- Extracted the pre-vendored snapshot to `/app/sqlite` (no network fetch).
- Configured with `./configure --gcov` (sets `USE_GCOV=1`), then built with `make sqlite3`. The compile used `-DSQLITE_COVERAGE_TEST=1 -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage` and linked `-lgcov`.
- Symlinked `/app/sqlite/sqlite3 → /usr/local/bin/sqlite3` so it's on PATH.

**Verification:**
- Binary contains `__gcov0.*` symbols and produced `.gcno` graph files at build.
- Running a query emits `.gcda` counters, and `gcov sqlite3-sqlite3.gcno` reports line-execution percentages — confirming end-to-end coverage instrumentation.
- `sqlite3 --version` → `3.50.4`; sample SQL runs correctly.

Note: coverage `.gcno` files and the object counters live in `/app/sqlite`; run the shell (or gcov) from there to collect/report coverage. I cleaned up the transient `.gcda` files from verification.
